message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "long-standing customer (2 years) gets 20% loyalty discount (sword -> 95G)"
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Add: customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2 triggers a 20% loyalty discount applied to itemsBase (unmodified policy base premium).

For sword + 2 year customer: 100 + 0 surcharge + 10 first ins - 20 loyalty + 5 fee = 95G.

Read the customer from the scenario object (scenario.customer.yearsWithMHPCO).

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll implement the minimal code to make the failing test pass.
Now I'll make the minimal change to apply a 20% loyalty discount when `customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`.

content.text:
All 18 active tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added `LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_RATE = 0.2` and `LOYALTY_THRESHOLD_YEARS = 2` constants. Read `scenario.customer.yearsWithMHPCO` (default 0) and subtract `itemsBase * 0.2` from the premium when years >= 2.
- Result: All 18 tests pass (25 todo).
- Approach: Minimal change. Added a `Customer` type, threaded customer through to `runScenario`, computed loyalty discount as a flat percentage of the unmodified `itemsBase`, and subtracted it inside the existing `Math.ceil` expression. For sword + 2 years: 100 + 0 + 10 - 20 + 5 = 95G.

File modified: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_06-11-58_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
